labels.zh-CN: 数值方法 · 第三章
labels.en: Numerical methods · chapter three

labels.zh-CN: 小残差，不等于低敏感性
labels.en: A small residual does not mean low sensitivity

labels.zh-CN: 求解准确性与问题条件是两件事
labels.en: Computational accuracy and problem conditioning are different

labels.zh-CN: 当前方程算得准吗？
labels.en: Is the current equation solved accurately?

labels.zh-CN: 输入稍变，解会稳吗？
labels.en: Will the solution remain stable if inputs change slightly?

labels.zh-CN: 相同房屋信息，不同单位尺度
labels.en: The same housing information under different unit scales

labels.zh-CN: 未缩放 X
labels.en: Unscaled X

labels.zh-CN: 标准化 X
labels.en: Standardized X

labels.zh-CN: 高维关系示意，不按实际尺度
labels.en: High-dimensional relationship schematic, not to scale

labels.zh-CN: 标准化改善单位尺度，但不会增加信息或消除真实共线性
labels.en: Standardization improves unit scale but does not add information or remove genuine collinearity

labels.zh-CN: 形成 Gram 矩阵，会平方方向差异
labels.en: Forming the Gram matrix squares directional disparities

labels.zh-CN: 奇异值描述不同方向的拉伸
labels.en: Singular values describe stretch in different directions

labels.zh-CN: 前提：满列秩；这里统一使用 2-范数
labels.en: Assumption: full column rank; all condition numbers use the 2-norm

labels.zh-CN: 正规方程的条件数比原设计矩阵更不利
labels.en: The normal system has less favorable conditioning than the design matrix

labels.zh-CN: 诊断场景：构造一列几乎重复的居住面积
labels.en: Diagnostic scenario: construct a nearly duplicated living-area column

labels.zh-CN: z_living 与 η 均已标准化；相加后不再缩放
labels.en: Both z_living and eta are already standardized; their sum is not rescaled

labels.zh-CN: 只用于诊断，不写回下载 CSV
labels.en: Diagnostic only; never written to the downloadable CSV

labels.zh-CN: 近重复设计
labels.en: Near-duplicate design

labels.zh-CN: 仍然满列秩，但已病态
labels.en: Still full rank, but ill-conditioned

labels.zh-CN: 沿最敏感方向加入一次固定目标扰动
labels.en: Add one fixed target perturbation along the most sensitive direction

labels.zh-CN: 相对目标扰动
labels.en: Relative target perturbation

labels.zh-CN: 相对系数变化
labels.en: Relative coefficient change

labels.zh-CN: 本次观察放大
labels.en: Observed amplification in this run
329.613418 is not the condition number

labels.zh-CN: 同一个 A、两个相邻右端项、两个各自唯一的解
labels.en: One A, two neighboring right-hand sides, and two respective unique solutions

labels.zh-CN: 系统 1
labels.en: System 1

labels.zh-CN: 系统 2
labels.en: System 2

labels.zh-CN: 不是同一右端项出现两个解；这是两个相邻系统
labels.en: These are two neighboring systems, not two solutions for one unchanged right-hand side

labels.zh-CN: 诊断之后，选择与问题匹配的处理
labels.en: After diagnosis, choose a response that matches the problem

labels.zh-CN: 可用处理
labels.en: Possible responses

labels.zh-CN: 缩放 · 去重或重参数化 · 更多有效数据 · 正则化
labels.en: Scaling · remove or reparameterize duplicates · more informative data · regularization

labels.zh-CN: 更高浮点精度不能补回近重复特征缺少的可辨识信息
labels.en: Higher floating-point precision cannot restore identifiability missing from near-duplicate features

labels.zh-CN: 下一章：稀疏矩阵
labels.en: Next chapter: sparse matrices
